mapper.select: WITH bgwriter_delta AS ( SELECT buffers_clean, buffers_backend, COALESCE( CASE WHEN buffers_clean - LAG(buffers_clean) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN buffers_clean ELSE buffers_clean - LAG(buffers_clean) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, buffers_clean ) AS delta_clean, COALESCE( CASE WHEN buffers_backend - LAG(buffers_backend) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN buffers_backend ELSE buffers_backend - LAG(buffers_backend) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, buffers_backend ) AS delta_backend FROM bgwriter_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 2 ) SELECT CASE WHEN (SUM(delta_clean) + SUM(delta_backend)) > 0 THEN ROUND(100.0 * SUM(delta_backend) / (SUM(delta_clean) + SUM(delta_backend)), 2) ELSE 0.0 END as value, COALESCE(SUM(delta_clean), 0) as buffersclean, COALESCE(SUM(delta_backend), 0) as buffersbackend FROM bgwriter_delta

SELECT TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI') AS time_label, COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(avg_clean_rate)::numeric, 2), 0.0) AS clean_rate FROM bgwriter_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} GROUP BY collected_at ORDER BY collected_at

WITH bgwriter_delta AS ( SELECT collected_at, total_buffers_clean, total_buffers_backend, COALESCE( CASE WHEN total_buffers_clean - LAG(total_buffers_clean) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN total_buffers_clean ELSE total_buffers_clean - LAG(total_buffers_clean) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, total_buffers_clean ) AS delta_clean, COALESCE( CASE WHEN total_buffers_backend - LAG(total_buffers_backend) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN total_buffers_backend ELSE total_buffers_backend - LAG(total_buffers_backend) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, total_buffers_backend ) AS delta_backend FROM bgwriter_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} ) SELECT TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI') AS time_label, COALESCE(delta_backend, 0) AS backend, COALESCE(delta_clean, 0) AS clean FROM bgwriter_delta ORDER BY collected_at

WITH bgwriter_delta AS ( SELECT collected_at, total_maxwritten_clean, COALESCE( CASE WHEN total_maxwritten_clean - LAG(total_maxwritten_clean) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN total_maxwritten_clean ELSE total_maxwritten_clean - LAG(total_maxwritten_clean) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, total_maxwritten_clean ) AS delta_maxwritten FROM bgwriter_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} ) SELECT TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI') AS time_label, COALESCE(delta_maxwritten, 0) AS maxwritten_clean FROM bgwriter_delta ORDER BY collected_at

WITH bgwriter_delta AS ( SELECT collected_at, total_buffers_clean, COALESCE( CASE WHEN total_buffers_clean - LAG(total_buffers_clean) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN total_buffers_clean ELSE total_buffers_clean - LAG(total_buffers_clean) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, total_buffers_clean ) AS delta_clean FROM bgwriter_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} ), checkpoint_delta AS ( SELECT collected_at, total_buffers_checkpoint, COALESCE( CASE WHEN total_buffers_checkpoint - LAG(total_buffers_checkpoint) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN total_buffers_checkpoint ELSE total_buffers_checkpoint - LAG(total_buffers_checkpoint) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, total_buffers_checkpoint ) AS delta_buffers FROM checkpoint_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} ) SELECT TO_CHAR(COALESCE(b.collected_at, c.collected_at), 'HH24:MI') AS time_label, COALESCE(b.delta_clean, 0) AS bgwriter, COALESCE(c.delta_buffers, 0) AS checkpoint FROM bgwriter_delta b FULL OUTER JOIN checkpoint_delta c ON b.collected_at = c.collected_at ORDER BY COALESCE(b.collected_at, c.collected_at)

WITH bgwriter_delta AS ( SELECT collected_at, total_buffers_clean, total_buffers_backend, COALESCE( CASE WHEN total_buffers_clean - LAG(total_buffers_clean) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN total_buffers_clean ELSE total_buffers_clean - LAG(total_buffers_clean) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, total_buffers_clean ) AS delta_clean, COALESCE( CASE WHEN total_buffers_backend - LAG(total_buffers_backend) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN total_buffers_backend ELSE total_buffers_backend - LAG(total_buffers_backend) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, total_buffers_backend ) AS delta_backend FROM bgwriter_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} ) SELECT TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI') AS time_label, COALESCE(ROUND(100.0 * delta_clean / NULLIF(delta_clean + delta_backend, 0), 2), 0.0) AS reuse_rate FROM bgwriter_delta ORDER BY collected_at

WITH bgwriter_delta AS ( SELECT collected_at, buffers_clean, buffers_backend, buffers_backend_fsync, COALESCE( CASE WHEN buffers_clean - LAG(buffers_clean) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN buffers_clean ELSE buffers_clean - LAG(buffers_clean) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, buffers_clean ) AS delta_clean, COALESCE( CASE WHEN buffers_backend - LAG(buffers_backend) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN buffers_backend ELSE buffers_backend - LAG(buffers_backend) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, buffers_backend ) AS delta_backend, COALESCE( CASE WHEN buffers_backend_fsync - LAG(buffers_backend_fsync) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN buffers_backend_fsync ELSE buffers_backend_fsync - LAG(buffers_backend_fsync) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, buffers_backend_fsync ) AS delta_fsync FROM bgwriter_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '1 hour' AND collected_at <= (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') ), recent_5min AS ( SELECT * FROM bgwriter_delta WHERE collected_at >= (CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AT TIME ZONE 'UTC') - INTERVAL '5 minutes' ) SELECT -- BGWriter 활동률: (100 - Backend Flush 비율) - BGWriter가 얼마나 활동하는지 COALESCE( 100.0 - (100.0 * SUM(delta_backend) / NULLIF(SUM(delta_clean) + SUM(delta_backend), 0)), 0.0 ) as bgwriteractivityrate,
-- Clean Buffer 재사용률: BGWriter가 쓴 버퍼 / 전체 버퍼 * 100 COALESCE( 100.0 * SUM(delta_clean) / NULLIF(SUM(delta_clean) + SUM(delta_backend), 0), 0.0 ) as cleanbufferreuserate,
-- Backend Fsync 발생: 최근 1시간 합계 COALESCE(SUM(delta_fsync), 0) as backendfsynccount,
-- Checkpoint에 의한 BGWriter 중단: 현재 구현 불가 (Checkpoint 모듈과 연동 필요) -- 임시로 0 반환 (추후 구현 필요) 0 as checkpointinterruptioncount FROM recent_5min

WITH bgwriter_delta AS ( SELECT collected_at, total_buffers_clean, total_buffers_backend, total_backend_fsync, avg_backend_flush_ratio, COALESCE( CASE WHEN total_buffers_clean - LAG(total_buffers_clean) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN total_buffers_clean ELSE total_buffers_clean - LAG(total_buffers_clean) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, total_buffers_clean ) AS delta_clean, COALESCE( CASE WHEN total_buffers_backend - LAG(total_buffers_backend) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN total_buffers_backend ELSE total_buffers_backend - LAG(total_buffers_backend) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, total_buffers_backend ) AS delta_backend, COALESCE( CASE WHEN total_backend_fsync - LAG(total_backend_fsync) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) < 0 THEN total_backend_fsync ELSE total_backend_fsync - LAG(total_backend_fsync) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) END, total_backend_fsync ) AS delta_fsync FROM bgwriter_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} ) SELECT -- BGWriter 활동률: (100 - Backend Flush 비율) - BGWriter가 얼마나 활동하는지 COALESCE( 100.0 - AVG(avg_backend_flush_ratio), 0.0 ) as bgwriteractivityrate,
-- Clean Buffer 재사용률: BGWriter가 쓴 버퍼 / 전체 버퍼 * 100 COALESCE( 100.0 * SUM(delta_clean) / NULLIF(SUM(delta_clean) + SUM(delta_backend), 0), 0.0 ) as cleanbufferreuserate,
-- Backend Fsync 발생: 최근 15분 합계 COALESCE(SUM(delta_fsync), 0) as backendfsynccount,
-- Checkpoint에 의한 BGWriter 중단: 현재 구현 불가 (Checkpoint 모듈과 연동 필요) -- 임시로 0 반환 (추후 구현 필요) 0 as checkpointinterruptioncount FROM bgwriter_delta

WITH bgwriter_with_delta AS ( SELECT r.bgwriter_raw_id, r.collected_at, r.buffers_alloc, r.buffers_clean, r.buffers_backend, r.buffers_backend_fsync, r.maxwritten_clean, -- 이전 행과 비교하여 증분 계산 COALESCE( CASE WHEN r.buffers_clean - LAG(r.buffers_clean) OVER (ORDER BY r.collected_at) < 0 THEN r.buffers_clean -- stats_reset 발생 시 현재 값 사용 ELSE r.buffers_clean - LAG(r.buffers_clean) OVER (ORDER BY r.collected_at) END, r.buffers_clean -- 첫 번째 행은 현재 값 사용 ) AS delta_buffers_clean, COALESCE( CASE WHEN r.buffers_backend - LAG(r.buffers_backend) OVER (ORDER BY r.collected_at) < 0 THEN r.buffers_backend ELSE r.buffers_backend - LAG(r.buffers_backend) OVER (ORDER BY r.collected_at) END, r.buffers_backend ) AS delta_buffers_backend, COALESCE( CASE WHEN r.buffers_backend_fsync - LAG(r.buffers_backend_fsync) OVER (ORDER BY r.collected_at) < 0 THEN r.buffers_backend_fsync ELSE r.buffers_backend_fsync - LAG(r.buffers_backend_fsync) OVER (ORDER BY r.collected_at) END, r.buffers_backend_fsync ) AS delta_buffers_backend_fsync, COALESCE( CASE WHEN r.maxwritten_clean - LAG(r.maxwritten_clean) OVER (ORDER BY r.collected_at) < 0 THEN r.maxwritten_clean ELSE r.maxwritten_clean - LAG(r.maxwritten_clean) OVER (ORDER BY r.collected_at) END, r.maxwritten_clean ) AS delta_maxwritten_clean FROM bgwriter_raw r WHERE r.instance_id = #{instanceId} AND r.collected_at >= #{startTime} AND r.collected_at <= #{endTime} ), calculated_stats AS ( SELECT bgwriter_raw_id, collected_at, buffers_alloc, delta_buffers_clean, delta_buffers_backend, delta_buffers_backend_fsync, delta_maxwritten_clean, -- Clean Rate 계산 (버퍼/초) COALESCE(delta_buffers_clean / 60.0, 0.0) AS cleanRate, -- Backend rate 계산 (초당) COALESCE(delta_buffers_backend / 60.0, 0.0) AS backendRate, -- Fsync rate 계산 (초당) COALESCE(delta_buffers_backend_fsync / 60.0, 0.0) AS fsyncRate, -- Maxwritten rate 계산 (분당) COALESCE(delta_maxwritten_clean, 0) AS maxWrittenRate, -- Backend Flush 비율 계산 CASE WHEN (delta_buffers_clean + delta_buffers_backend) > 0 THEN 100.0 * delta_buffers_backend / (delta_buffers_clean + delta_buffers_backend) ELSE 0.0 END AS backendRatio, -- 상태 판단 CASE WHEN (delta_buffers_clean + delta_buffers_backend) > 0 AND (100.0 * delta_buffers_backend / (delta_buffers_clean + delta_buffers_backend)) > 50.0 THEN '위험' WHEN (delta_buffers_clean + delta_buffers_backend) > 0 AND (100.0 * delta_buffers_backend / (delta_buffers_clean + delta_buffers_backend)) > 30.0 THEN '주의' WHEN delta_maxwritten_clean > 0 THEN '주의' ELSE '정상' END AS status FROM bgwriter_with_delta ) SELECT bgwriter_raw_id AS id, TO_CHAR(collected_at, 'HH24:MI') AS timestamp, COALESCE(buffers_alloc, 0) AS buffersAlloc, COALESCE(ROUND(cleanRate::numeric, 2), 0.0) AS cleanRate, COALESCE(ROUND(backendRate::numeric, 2), 0.0) AS backendRate, 0 AS checkpointBuffers, COALESCE(ROUND(backendRatio::numeric, 2), 0.0) AS backendRatio, COALESCE(ROUND(fsyncRate::numeric, 2), 0.0) AS fsyncRate, COALESCE(maxWrittenRate, 0) AS maxWrittenRate, 0.0 AS avgcycletime, COALESCE(status, '정상') AS status FROM calculated_stats
WHERE status IN
#{status}
ORDER BY collected_at DESC
SELECT instance_id FROM monitor_instance ORDER BY instance_id

SELECT bgwriter_raw_id, instance_id, collected_at, buffers_clean, buffers_backend, buffers_backend_fsync, maxwritten_clean, created_at, buffers_alloc, avg_cycle_time_ms FROM bgwriter_raw WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at < #{collectedAt} ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bgwriter_raw ( instance_id, collected_at, buffers_clean, buffers_backend, buffers_backend_fsync, maxwritten_clean, buffers_alloc, avg_cycle_time_ms, created_at ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{buffersClean}, #{buffersBackend}, #{buffersBackendFsync}, #{maxwrittenClean}, #{buffersAlloc}, #{avgCycleTimeMs}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO bgwriter_agg_1m ( instance_id, collected_at, avg_backend_flush_ratio, avg_clean_rate, total_buffers_clean, total_buffers_backend, total_backend_fsync, total_maxwritten_clean, status, avg_cycle_time_ms, created_at ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{avgBackendFlushRatio}, #{avgCleanRate}, #{totalBuffersClean}, #{totalBuffersBackend}, #{totalBackendFsync}, #{totalMaxwrittenClean}, #{status}, #{avgCycleTimeMs}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO bgwriter_agg_5m ( instance_id, collected_at, avg_backend_flush_ratio, avg_clean_rate, total_buffers_clean, total_buffers_backend, total_backend_fsync, total_maxwritten_clean, status, avg_cycle_time_ms, created_at ) VALUES ( #{instanceId}, #{collectedAt}, #{avgBackendFlushRatio}, #{avgCleanRate}, #{totalBuffersClean}, #{totalBuffersBackend}, #{totalBackendFsync}, #{totalMaxwrittenClean}, #{status}, #{avgCycleTimeMs}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT bgwriter_agg_id, instance_id, collected_at, avg_backend_flush_ratio, avg_clean_rate, total_buffers_clean, total_buffers_backend, total_backend_fsync, total_maxwritten_clean, status, created_at, avg_cycle_time_ms FROM bgwriter_agg_1m WHERE instance_id = #{instanceId} AND collected_at >= #{startTime} AND collected_at <= #{endTime} ORDER BY collected_at ASC
